title: Understanding Federal Notices of Award — Special Workshop Slides (Steiner, 2022-12)
display_label: Understanding Federal Notices of Award Slides (2022-12-09)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2022-12-09 Cost Allowability Special Workshop, third presentation 'Understanding Federal Notices of Award' by Becca Steiner. Distinct from the 2022-11-30 D-RED four-part award numbers series (form_dred_2022_11_30_award_numbers_series) — this Special Workshop version focuses specifically on parsing a Notice of Award document for cost-allowability terms and conditions.
